user.title: E87 Smart Digital Badge
user.description: Pick a discovered E87 badge to configure, or choose 'Enter MAC address manually' to type it in (the badge shows its MAC on screen when unpaired).

manual.title: Enter badge MAC address
manual.description: Wake the badge and note the MAC address shown on its screen (format like AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF). Enter it below.

abort.not_supported: This Bluetooth device is not an E87 badge.

error.invalid_mac: That doesn't look like a valid MAC address. Use the format AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF.

send_image.name: Send image
send_image.description: Render and push a still image to the badge.

image.name: Image
image.description: Path, URL, data URI, or base64 image payload.

send_text.name: Send text
send_text.description: Render a text message as an image on the badge.

send_slideshow.name: Send slideshow
send_slideshow.description: Push a sequence of images that rotate on the badge.

send_gif.name: Send GIF
send_gif.description: Push an animated GIF to the badge.

image.name: GIF
image.description: GIF source (path, URL, data URI, or base64).

max_fps.name: Maximum FPS
max_fps.description: Cap on the playback frame rate.

send_danmaku.name: Send danmaku
send_danmaku.description: Render a scrolling danmaku-style text banner.
